name_cn:
🎉New Gardener Bag🎉 Linen 1BG554 Medium🎉🎉
This mini handbag is inspired by timeless nautical elements, reinterpreting a classic silhouette. Made of cotton canvas with leather trim showcasing exquisite versatility. Canvas handle, detachable and adjustable logo-print woven shoulder strap, detachable leather key charm. Can be carried by hand or over the shoulder. Large capacity, stunning, and another timeless bestseller🎉🎉 worth owning
Size: 33x19x20cm
